name: Pork Chops with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops in a skillet on the stove.
2. Put aside.
3. Place rice in a greased 9x13 dish.
4. Pour beef bouillon and water over the rice.
5. Place pork chops on top of the rice.
6. Pour mushroom soup and 1/2 can of water over the pork chops.
7. Sprinkle onion soup mix over the pork chops and rice.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Cook at 325 degrees for 1 hour.
